WORK CAPACITY
i
Measures how much total weight you moved in a session — kg × reps across all completed sets. Reflects your overall training load and endurance over time.
VOL—Total volume: sum of kg × reps
TIME—Workout duration in minutes
VOL/TIME—Volume per minute (efficiency)

FEATURES
✦Track workouts with sets, reps & weight

Your workouts are saved locally on your device. No account required. No data leaves your device.
